name: Pizza via Veneto
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the hot roll mix and let it rise as directed on the package.
2. Divide the dough into two equal parts.
3. Pat each part, using oiled hands, into an evenly shaped rectangle in a well-oiled 15x10x1-inch jelly-roll pan.
4. Beat eggs, evaporated milk, and peanut butter until smooth.
5. Add chopped pimiento and celery seed to the mixture; stir in shredded cheese.
6. Spread the mixture evenly over the dough, almost to the edges of the pans.
7. Sprinkle with chopped salted peanuts and hot pepper flakes.
8. Cover the pans; let rise for 30 minutes.
9. Preheat the oven to 425°F (220°C).
10. Bake for 12-15 minutes or until brown and bubbly.
11. Cut into rectangles measuring 4x2 inches.
12. Serve hot.
